product.name: Bean Bag Chairs with Faux Rabbit Fur Cover, 3 ft Giant Memory Foam Bean Bag Chairs for Adults/Teens with Filling,Ultra Soft Faux Fur Fabric, Round Sofa for Living Room Bedroom College Dorm
features: EASY MAINTENANCE: Our premium tested corduroy covers are soft and smooth to the touch, dry clean and resistant to stains, discoloration for easy care.

HIGH-REBOUND MEMORY FOAM: This bean bag is filled with our patented shredded foam technology. easy to rebound more memory foam that is highly durable to maintain shape over prolonged use. Because it arrives compressed, it may take up to 24 hours to expand to its full potential.

For Everyone: 3Foot size 22" Off the ground and 36” x 36” in size, babies, toddlers and kids will love how much room They offer.Designed to support small rowdy toddlers and growing kids, these stuffed chairs are built to last, while adults enjoy the single sized seating.

FUN FOR EVERYONE - These convenient foam cushions are the perfect addition for your dorm rooms. Easily accessible and lighter than most home recliners. The bean bag chair handle is devised on the top of bag so that children can move them easily. With the double-layered combined fabric on the back, we guarantee its durability and obsolete the inner bag to increase the fluidity of stuffing, in order to wrap the body faster and more comfortable in accordance with ergonomics.
LIFETIME SERVICE: We believe in our durable Bean Bag Chairs! Totally risk-free purchase with our lifetime after-sales service. If any problem, please contact us for professional help.
